result.stdout:
SpecBridge 0.0.2
Copyright (c) 2024 .NET wat we zoeken

  -f, --features    paths to feature files. default is './'
  --url             Required. atlassian base url, for example
                    'https://nwwz.atlassian.net/'
  --space           Required. atlassian space key, for example 'SpecBridge'
  --page            Required. id of the page under which to place the
                    specifications
  --user            Required. username to authenticate with
  --token           Required. api token to authenticate with
  --reference       A reference that is added into comment of a confluence page
                    version
  --childlimit      The limit of the number of children to retrieve when
                    retrieving children from Confluence. Default is 25.
  --help            Display this help screen.
  --version         Display version information.
